title: Senior Instructional Designer at Arena Animation

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Arena Animation
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
